Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 8 

CONTRACT_ID_09 (previous year) 

LABEL: Part D Contract Identifier for Previous Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS. This 
was the Contract ID for the plan in 2009. It may or may not be the same as the Contract ID in the 
reference year (2010). 

This field is a key that links of Part D sponsor's
